creator: bbtruk@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Created attachment 228956
Patch to version 1.0.0

Changes:
- Update to version 1.0.0.
  New features: https://github.com/doublecmd/doublecmd/wiki/Changes-in-version-1.0.0
  Detailed changelog: https://doublecmd.sourceforge.io/mantisbt/changelog_page.php?version_id=56
- Website URL updated.
- Use Github to get sources.
- Fix Portlint warnings.

Deleted files:
- files/patch-components_multithreadprocs_mtpcpu.pas
- files/patch-src_platform_udefaultplugins.pas
- files/patch-src_platform_unix_upipeserver.pas

Tested with Poudriere.


I'm not sure if this should be a candidate to MFH to quarterly. There are no breaking changes and no other port depends on this, but it brings some new features. I can't find clear guidelines in the docs about when to request a MFH.
